halt_resolution_options: OPTION 1 (preferred): NTS paste full v1.0 content of UZG_PLUS_LANE1_CLA_PERSISTENT_REMINDERS_v1.md into chat as a code block; CLAC-1 re-dispatched with new task containing the v1.0 content; CLAC-1 then authors v1.1 = pasted-v1.0 + new §15 + changelog entry.

OPTION 2: NTS dispatch a simpler task that authors a NEW governance file (different filename like UZG_PLUS_LANE1_CLA_URL_BLOCK_RULE_v1.md) containing ONLY the §15 LIVE MIRROR URL BLOCK convention as a standalone rule; this avoids the v1.0 baseline dependency and still achieves the task intent (encode the new rule).
OPTION 3: NTS commits v1.0 to workspace via separate path (manual git push or new task dispatch to CLAC-1 with v1.0 content) BEFORE re-dispatching this task; CLAC-1 then proceeds normally.
